hero.title: When do I Retired
hero.subtitle: Plan your financial freedom, one number at a time.
hero.sub_cta: Free to use. No credit card required.

preview.title: Two tools, one goal
preview.subtitle: Everything you need to understand where you stand financially and when you can stop working.
preview.tool1_desc: Enter your savings, monthly contributions, and target years. Get a projected pot, 4% rule drawdown, inflation-adjusted income, and a lifestyle tier — from Hustler to The Millionaire.
preview.tool2_desc: Track your assets, debts, monthly cash flow, and emergency fund. Get a clear financial status — Stable, Vulnerable, or High Stress.
